summary: Tested iteration 11 features: 10x Unicorn app upgrades including dynamic quotes, CRM contact fields, profile edit goal, and messages navigation. Found 2 critical UI rendering bugs.

ui_bugs.issue: Edit Goal button (testID='edit-goal-btn') is NOT rendering on the Profile page. Code exists at lines 316-319 but the button does not appear in DOM. The cardHeader flexbox layout may be causing visibility issues on web.

Dynamic contact form fields for Prospect, Referral Partner, Strategic Partner, Client, and Resource labels are NOT rendering. Only Wormhole label shows its specific fields. Code exists at lines 843-953 but conditional rendering fails for non-wormhole labels.

determination_slider_dynamic_quotes.details: Slider shows DETERMINATION LEVEL header, Low/Level 10 labels, emoji scale, and motivational quotes that change based on slider level (building level quotes at level 5)

messages_back_button.details: Messages screen code has back button with testID='back-btn' at line 137, but navigation to /messages requires clicking chat icon which navigates to messages route

signal_date_filtering.details: Backend handles both YYYY-MM-DD and MM/DD/YY date formats for signal filtering

crm_dynamic_contact_fields.details: Wormhole label shows all 15+ specific fields (Connection Level, Tags, Power Leverage, etc.). Other labels (Prospect, Referral Partner, Strategic Partner, Client, Resource) do NOT show their specific fields - only basic fields appear.

profile_edit_goal_button.details: Edit Goal button code exists in profile.tsx but does not render on web. The cardHeader contains rocket icon but editGoalBtn is not visible in DOM.

contact_picker_modal.details: Contact picker modal code exists in wormhole.tsx - mobile-only feature using expo-contacts

action_items: FIX BUG: Profile Edit Goal button not rendering - the cardHeader flexbox may need style fixes for web. Check if the editGoalBtn TouchableOpacity is being hidden by CSS or layout issues.

FIX BUG: CRM dynamic contact fields - only Wormhole renders specific fields. Check if contactForm.label state is being set correctly when clicking other label options (Prospect, Referral Partner, etc.). The conditional rendering {contactForm.label === 'prospect' && (...)} may not be working.
VERIFY: The label value comparison might be case-sensitive - ensure onClick handlers use lowercase (e.g., 'prospect' not 'Prospect')
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two major bugs found: 1) Profile Edit Goal button not in DOM despite code existing, 2) CRM contact form only shows dynamic fields for Wormhole label, not for Prospect/Client/etc. Both are rendering issues likely related to conditional state handling or CSS layout.
rca_of_issue: Profile Edit Goal Bug: The TouchableOpacity with testID='edit-goal-btn' is inside cardHeader which has flexDirection: 'row' and justifyContent: 'space-between'. The button may be rendering but pushed off-screen or collapsed. CRM Dynamic Fields Bug: The contactForm.label state may not be updating correctly when clicking label buttons, causing the conditional rendering to fail for non-wormhole labels.
